title: Jharkhand JSSC JTGLCCE Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 611 Assistant, Inspector and More Posts
organization: Jharkhand Staff Selection Commission (JSSC), Kalinagar, Chayabagan, Namkum, Ranchi-834010
short_info: Jharkhand Staff Selection Commission (JSSC) has published the JTGLCCE-2026 Notification (Advertisement No. 01/2026) on 07 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill vacancies across 611 posts under various departments of the Jharkhand Government. Candidates within the prescribed age range and holding the required educational qualification are eligible to apply online at https://jssc.jharkhand.gov.in/. The application process will be active from 01 June 2026 to 30 June 2026, and candidates can access the official notification PDF and apply online link below.

application_fee.details: Candidates must pay the examination fee through online mode only. The fee is non-refundable. | Note: Candidates from Jharkhand's SC/ST category who apply under another category at concessional rate may have their application cancelled.

age_limit.details: Age will be calculated as on 01-08-2025. The minimum age limit is 21 years for all posts. Age relaxation is applicable as per Jharkhand Government rules. | Note: Only one of PwD or Ex-Servicemen age relaxation will be applicable. Age limit for Junior Scientific Assistant post (Sr. No. 8) is determined based on date of first appointment in service.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of online submission of applications (30-06-2026). Admission to examination is purely provisional. The minimum educational qualification must be possessed by the last date of online application. | Post-wise Minimum Qualification

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Entomologist, Vector-Borne Disease Control Programme
Assistant Vector-Borne Disease Control Officer / Assistant Vector-Borne Disease Control Officer
Block Statistical Supervisor / Junior Statistical Assistant / Investigator
Junior Scientific Assistant, State Drug Testing Laboratory, Namkum, Ranchi

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted through online mode at https://jssc.jharkhand.gov.in/ only. No hard copy of the application or documents should be sent to the JSSC office. Candidates should not wait until the last date and must submit applications well in advance.
Visit https://jssc.jharkhand.gov.in/ and log in to apply online.
Read the notification/brochure carefully before filling the form.
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. Admission to the exam is purely provisional. Issuance of Admit Card does not confirm eligibility; JSSC will verify certificates after the main exam. Mobile phones, pagers, Bluetooth devices or any electronic gadgets are strictly prohibited inside the examination centre; candidature will be cancelled if found. Candidates debarred by UPSC / JPSC / JSSC or any other selection commission within the specified period are not eligible to appear. A re-evaluation fee of Rs. 500/- can be applied within 7 days of result declaration. If mass copying is reported and proved at a centre, JSSC reserves the right to cancel the entire exam at that centre. Candidates currently employed in Govt./PSU/Autonomous bodies need not submit NOC at application stage but must produce a proper relieving order at the time of joining. The correction window (05-07-2026 to 10-07-2026) allows changes to all fields except Name, Date of Birth, Email ID and Mobile Number. If a category is changed (e.g. from reserved to unreserved), the difference in exam fee must be paid. Candidates applying for both Advertisement No. 01/2026 and 02/2026 need to pay only one exam fee. Candidates applying under Sports Quota must note the eligible standards as per Resolution No. 1709, dated 12.09.2007, available on the JSSC website. All selections, notices and merit lists will be published only on the JSSC official website. Candidates are advised to check regularly. Any dispute regarding the recruitment will be settled within the jurisdiction of Ranchi only.
